entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00039) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00039 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO REPLACE IN ITS ENTIRETY BOTH SECTION B.4 "DETERMINATION OF AWARD FEE" AND SECTION G.3 "SUBMISSION OF INVOICES." (BLOCK 4 TO THIS MOD ALSO INCLUDES PR #2111201HRM214.)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO REVISE ATTACHMENT J.5 WAGE DETERMINATIONS TO UPDATE THE WAGE DETERMINATIONS CURRENTLY APPLICABLE TO THIS CONTRACT, AND ADD A NEW WAGE DETERMINATION FOR JACKSON, MS (HINDS COUNTY). AA11HCF013

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00041) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00041 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE A NEW IDIQ CLIN (I.E. 3005AC "BACKGROUND CHECK") IN SUPPORT OF CLIN 3005 BACKGROUND CHECK.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00042) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00042 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD, IN ITS ENTIRETY, ATTACHMENT J.6 -TRANSACTION COUNTING METHODOLOGY AGAINST THE BASE CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010. THIS DOCUMENT SPELLS OUT THE METHODOLOGY FOR COUNTING TRANSACTIONS AGAINST THE CURRENT FFP CLINS X004 - "AIRPORT ASSESSMENTS," X012 - "DOCUMENT PROCESSING," X015 - "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING," AND X016 - "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING." ALSO, TO INCORPORATE A NEW SECTION B - "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" TO REFLECT THE BREAKDOWN OF THE NEW TRANSACTION REQUIREMENT FOR CLIN'S X004, FOR OPTION PERIODS 2 THROUGH 7.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00043) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00043 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO: 1) ADD SECTION 15 ENHANCEMENTS TO EMPLOYEE RELATIONS CASE MANAGEMENT AS PART OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW). THIS REQUIREMENT IS WITHIN SCOPE OF THE CURRENT SOW; 2) ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 3028 ENHANCEMENTS TO EMPLOYEE RELATIONS CASE MANAGEMENT - DEVELOP OOI INVESTIGATIONS AND HOTLINE APPLICATIONS AND DEVELOP EXECUTIVE LEVEL DASHBOARD REPORTS FOR OPTION PERIOD 2; 3) ADD CLIN 4028 ENHANCEMENTS TO EMPLOYEE RELATIONS CASE MANAGEMENT - MIGRATE LEGACY OOI INVESTIGATION DATA (OPTION) FOR OPTION PERIOD 3; 4) ADD SUB-CLINS 4021AA THRU 8021AA O&M FOR ENHANCEMENTS TO EMPLOYEE RELATIONS CASE MANAGEMENT FOR OPTION PERIODS 3 THRU 7; 5) INCORPORATE THE REVISED SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS, FOR IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00044) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00044 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO 1) ADD AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 3018 B "HELP DESK - EPMP;" 2) TO INCORPORATE THE ADDITION OF THE EMPLOYEE PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT PROGRAM (EPMP) TO SECTION 6 OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) (ATTACHMENT A); AND 3) TO INCORPORATE THE REVISED SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS (ATTACHMENT B), FOR IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00047 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES, TO INCORPORATE SUB-CLINS 3015AC SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 92,000 PASS TRANSACTIONS) AND 3015AD SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 30,492) IN SUPPORT OF TASK ORDER HSTS01-09-J-HRM048.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00048) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00048 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES. DUE TO SYSTEM ISSUES THAT ARE PRECLUDING TSA FROM PROCESSING THIS ACTION, IT WAS DETERMINED AS AN ADMINISTRATIVE NECESSITY, CREATING SUB-CLIN'S 3015AE AND 3015AF WOULD MEET REQUIREMENT NEEDS. THIS MODIFICATION WILL REPLACE SUB-CLINS 3015AC SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 92,000 PASS TRANSACTIONS) AND 3015AD SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 30,492) WITH SUB-CLINS 3015AE SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 92,000 PASS TRANSACTIONS) AND 3015AF SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 30,492)IN SUPPORT OF TASK ORDER HSTS01-09-J-HRM048.
A FUTURE MODIFICATION WILL BE PROCESSED TO ZERO OUT THE DOLLAR AMOUNTS FOR SUB-CLIN'S 3015AC SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 92,000 PASS TRANSACTIONS) AND 3015AD SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (QTY. 30,492), ONCE SYSTEM ISSUES ARE RESOLVED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
